goal:
Two-task verification of the await/boot race. Do exactly two tasks, in order, each as a separate dispatched worker. Task 1: create a file named PROOF2.txt in the current working directory whose entire contents are the single line, exactly verbatim: L1_CREATED. Task 2 (only after Task 1 is resolved): append a second line to that same PROOF2.txt so its full contents become exactly two lines, verbatim:
L1_CREATED
L2_APPENDED
Then finish the mission. Do not do anything else. Write the literal bytes exactly; do not paraphrase or reformat.
